artifact_refs.description: Executed notebook used as evidence for the TC1 bank-id human baseline.
Run-level provenance metadata for the bank-id human baseline.

Author notes for the bank-id human baseline.

notes: Re-authored TC1 human baseline against the current Spaceship action bank using the executed notebook as evidence. Selected only bank actions with clear notebook support and a defensible mapping to the canonical benchmark contract.
